headline: Beyond
Beauty.
hero.subheadline: Filipino-made essentials for retail, wellness, and distribution partners.
hero.body: KGOLD supplies reliable skincare, haircare, and wellness formulas built for resellers, salons, and online sellers across the Philippines.

featuredCategories.title: Discover.
featuredCategories.description: A growing portfolio of skincare, personal care, wellness, and men's products designed for everyday use and real customer demand.

items.name: Skincare
items.description: Daily essentials focused on cleansing, hydration, brightening, and skin maintenance.

items.name: Wellness
items.description: Products that support everyday wellness through practical and accessible solutions.

items.name: Men's Essentials
items.description: Trusted products developed for men's grooming, confidence, and performance.

items.name: Herbal Products
items.description: Traditional ingredients and modern formulations combined for everyday use.

bestSellers.title: Trusted Daily.
bestSellers.description: Products that customers continue to purchase, recommend, and reorder across the country.

items.name: KGOLD Radiance Serum
items.description: Vitamin-infused daily serum for visible luminosity and even tone.

items.name: Silk Repair Shampoo
items.description: Keratin-rich formula that restores softness after just one wash.

items.name: Velvet Body Cream
items.description: Deep hydration with a lightweight finish — never greasy, always smooth.

items.name: Daily Defense SPF 50
items.description: Broad-spectrum protection that layers seamlessly under makeup.

trustSection.title: Proof That Matters.
trustSection.description: Real metrics, trusted partners, and reliable supply capacity that make KGOLD a stronger choice for retail, wellness, and distribution.

aboutTeaser.title: Built Through Trust.
aboutTeaser.mission: What began as a small operation continues to expand through customer loyalty, strong partnerships, and consistent execution.

values.title: Manufacturing Standards
values.description: Every product goes through a careful process before reaching customers. Consistency remains at the center of everything we release.

values.title: Product Integrity
values.description: We work with trusted manufacturers and suppliers who meet our standards for quality and reliability.

values.title: Partner Confidence
values.description: Thousands of sales happen because customers trust the products and partners trust the brand behind them.

faqSection.title: Frequently Asked Questions.
faqSection.description: Common questions about our products, partnerships, and opportunities.

faq.question: Where can I buy KGOLD products?
faq.answer: Our products are available through authorized distributors, resellers, online selling channels, and selected retail partners nationwide.

faq.question: How do I become a reseller or distributor?
faq.answer: Contact our team to discuss partner terms, catalog access, and stock availability for retail, online, and salon distribution.

faq.question: What support do you offer partners?
faq.answer: We provide product training, marketing materials, and flexible fulfillment for distributors and retail customers.

faq.question: Do you offer wholesale partnerships?
faq.answer: Yes. We work with distributors, retailers, and business partners across different regions in the Philippines.

finalCta.title: Grow Together.
finalCta.description: Whether you're a customer, reseller, distributor, or business partner, there's always room to build something meaningful together.
